TaskDescription: Isometric knee extension at 90 deg of hip flexion and 60 deg of knee flexion. Participants matched force profiles displayed on a screen.
Instructions: Sit upright in the dynamometer chair. Keep your thigh flat on the seat and follow the force trace on the screen.

TaskDescription: Isometric dorsiflexion at fixed ankle angle (90 deg). Two simultaneous 3x3 grids over proximal and distal right tibialis anterior. Participants matched force profiles displayed on a screen.
Instructions: Sit with your leg relaxed. Keep your ankle at 90 degrees and follow the force trace on the screen as accurately as you can.

TaskDescription: Isometric dorsiflexion at fixed ankle angle (90 deg). Single 4x4 grid over right tibialis anterior. Participants matched force profiles displayed on a screen.
Instructions: Sit with your leg relaxed. Keep your ankle at 90 degrees and follow the force trace on the screen as accurately as you can.
